backstory.original: A devoted cleric of Shar, goddess of darkness and loss, Shadowheart agreed to have her memories wiped as part of a holy mission. Now its sole survivor, she must deliver a powerful relic back to her kin in order to win Shar's love and have her memories restored - but all the while, she is tormented by strange, painful magic that she struggles to understand.
backstory.display: 作为黑暗与失落女神莎尔的虔诚牧师，影心同意在一项神圣使命中将自己的记忆抹去。如今她成为了唯一的幸存者，她必须将一件强大的圣物交还给她的族人，才能赢得莎尔女神的宠爱并恢复自己的记忆——但与此同时，她受到奇怪而痛苦的魔法的折磨，而她对此难以理解。

description.original: Shadowheart casts Sacred Flame on a random enemy, dealing 1 hit.
description.display: 影心向一名随机敌人施放神圣之焰，造成 1 次命中。

description.original: Shadowheart's mysterious relic prevents all damage for a short while.
description.display: 影心的神秘圣物可以在短时间内阻挡所有伤害。

longDescription.original: Shadowheart's mysterious relic strikes back enemies and prevents all damage to your Champions for a short while.
longDescription.display: 影心的神秘圣物可以击退敌人，并在短时间内阻挡对你的勇士造成的所有伤害。

description.original: Shadowheart increases the damage of Champions within two slots of her.
description.display: 影心使距离她两个栏位以内的勇士伤害提高。

description.original: Shadowheart heals Champions in the two columns ahead of her every second.
description.display: 影心每秒治疗位于其前方两列的勇士。

description.desc: Shadowheart increases the damage of Champions within two slots of her by $(amount)%.
影心使距离她两个栏位以内的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Shadowheart increases the damage of Champions within two slots of her.
tipText.display: 影心使距离她两个栏位以内的勇士伤害提高。

description.desc: Shadowheart heals Champions in the two columns ahead of her for $(amount) every second.
影心每秒为位于其前方两列的勇士治疗 $(amount)。

tipText.original: Shadowheart heals Champions in the two columns ahead of her every second.
tipText.display: 影心每秒治疗位于其前方两列的勇士。

description.desc: Your formation gains one Ceremorphosis stack due to the mind flayer tadpole in Shadowheart's brain. Shadowheart increases the effect of Twilight Trickery by $(amount)% for each Ceremorphosis stack, stacking multiplicatively.
影心大脑中的夺心魔蝌蚪使你的阵型获得一层“蜕变”堆叠。每层“蜕变”均使影心的“暮光诡术”效果提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

Shadowheart creates an Illusory Duplicate of herself which hides in the formation and applies Twilight Trickery and Light in the Dark to Champions relative to itself with half the range as normal. The duplicate positions itself in the same formation slot as the Champion in the formation with the highest DEX score. Ties go to the Champion in the highest bench seat.

conditions.desc: ^^Illusory Duplicate Source: $shadowheart_illusory_duplicate_target^Twilight Trickery Damage Buff: $shadowheart_twilight_trickery_amount%^Light In The Dark Heal Amount: $shadowheart_light_in_the_dark_amount

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Twilight Trickery - Increases the damage of $target by $amount%
Light In The Dark - Heals $target for $amount every second

description.desc: 影心创造一个自己的虚幻分身，隐藏在阵型中，并对分身周围的勇士施加“暮光诡术”和“黑暗之光”，其范围为正常范围的一半。分身将自己置于阵型中敏捷属性最高的勇士的相同栏位中。与出战栏位最高的勇士链接。

conditions.desc: ^^虚幻分身来源：$shadowheart_illusory_duplicate_target^暮光诡术伤害增益：$shadowheart_twilight_trickery_amount%^黑暗之光治疗量：$shadowheart_light_in_the_dark_amount

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 暮光诡术--使$target的伤害提高 $amount%

description.desc: Shadowheart's base attack is replaced by Guidance. When she casts Guidance, she increases the damage of your BUD-setting Champion's next attack by $(not_buffed amount)%. Stacks multiplicatively up to $(max_stacks) times.
影心的基本攻击替换为“指引”。施放“指引”时，她使你的基础杀招伤害设置勇士的下一次攻击伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%。最多可以乘算堆叠 $(max_stacks) 次。

specializationDescription.original: Shadowheart stops attacking and instead casts Guidance, repeatedly...
specializationDescription.display: 影心停止攻击，开始反复施放指引……

description.desc: If Shadowheart's Illusory Duplicate is placed in the same slot as she is, the effect of Twilight Trickery is increased by $(amount)%.
如果影心的虚幻分身被放置在和她自身相同的栏位中，那么“暮光诡术”的效果提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Shadowheart's buff greatly increases when she's standing beside herself!
specializationDescription.display: 影心站在自己身边时，增益效果大幅提高！

description.desc: The effects of Twilight Trickery and Light In The Dark from Shadowheart's Illusory Duplicate are increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each formation slot away from Shadowheart the duplicate is (following the shortest path), stacking multiplicatively.
影心的“虚幻分身”每离开本体 1 格（沿最短路径），其“暮光诡术”和“黑暗之光”的效果均提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Sometimes you need to seek out the things you've forgotten.
specializationDescription.display: 有时你必须寻找早已遗忘的东西。

description.original: Should I worry about the others in combat? I'm unconvinced.
description.display: 我在战斗时应该关心其他人吗？我不敢苟同。

description.original: Our pain will fuel us! The Absolute will be defeated!
description.display: 痛苦会激励我们！真神必将落败！

description.original: We are stronger in the shadows. Lead them into the dark!
description.display: 暗影让我们更强大。引领他们进入黑暗！

description.original: If we cannot find my Lady's darkness, then it shall find us.
description.display: 如果找不到我那位女士的黑暗，那它就会找到我们。

description.original: We must walk the path of shadows.
description.display: 我们必须走上暗影之道。

description.original: I can feel the tadpole moving around in my mind. It wants more.
description.display: 我能感觉到蝌蚪在我的脑海里移动。它想要更多。

description.original: Our power comes from the enemy.
It may be illithid, but it's our only chance for survival.
description.display: 它或许是灵吸怪，但这是我们唯一的存活机会。

description.original: Help is not free. Suffering must be exchanged.
description.display: 帮助不是免费。必须交换痛苦。
通过失去，我们得到治愈。

description.original: I prefer to cast these spells out of combat - but if it will help, so be it.
description.display: 我更喜欢在不战斗的情况下施放这些法术——但如果这有帮助，那就这样吧。

description.original: Pain was my teacher. Let's share what I've learned.
description.display: 我从痛苦中汲取了经验。现在我将与你分享它们。

description.original: You can't cast a shadow without some light.
Lady Shar demands my heart, and I give it to her freely.
description.display: 莎尔女神要我的心，我就心甘情愿地给她。

description.original: It's quite the menagerie of colorful companions I find myself surrounded with.
description.display: 围绕在我身边的这群伙伴真是性格各异。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by 20% for each unique species in the formation, stacking additively.

adventures.name: Can't Cast a Shadow Without Some Light

character_sheet_details.backstory: A devoted cleric of Shar, goddess of darkness and loss, Shadowheart agreed to have her memories wiped as part of a holy mission. Now its sole survivor, she must deliver a powerful relic back to her kin in order to win Shar's love and have her memories restored - but all the while, she is tormented by strange, painful magic that she struggles to understand.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Shadowheart buffs Champions within two slots, heals Champions in the two columns ahead, and duplicates her buffs on an illusionary double.

event_upgrades.name: Twilight Trickery
event_upgrades.description: Shadowheart increases the damage of Champions within two slots of her.

event_upgrades.name: Light In The Dark
event_upgrades.description: Shadowheart heals Champions in the two columns ahead of her every second.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 作为黑暗与失落女神莎尔的虔诚牧师，影心同意在一项神圣使命中将自己的记忆抹去。如今她成为了唯一的幸存者，她必须将一件强大的圣物交还给她的族人，才能赢得莎尔女神的宠爱并恢复自己的记忆——但与此同时，她受到奇怪而痛苦的魔法的折磨，而她对此难以理解。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 影心为距离自身两个栏位以内的勇士提供增益，治疗位于她前方两列的勇士，并通过虚幻分身复制她的增益。

event_upgrades.name: 暮光诡术
event_upgrades.description: 影心使距离她两个栏位以内的勇士伤害提高。

event_upgrades.name: 黑暗之光
event_upgrades.description: 影心每秒治疗位于其前方两列的勇士。
